title: MaRCoS, an open-source electronic control system for low-field MRI
note: Technical source for an open low-field MRI control system using open hardware, firmware, and software.

title: OCRA MRI
note: Open-source project documentation for a low-cost MRI console based on Red Pitaya hardware.

title: A fully open-source framework for streaming and cloud-processing of low-field MRI data
note: Technical source for open low-field MRI streaming and cloud-processing that decouples acquisition hardware from computational reconstruction.

title: SUPRA: Open Source Software Defined Ultrasound Processing for Real-Time Applications
note: Technical source for an LGPLv3 open-source ultrasound processing pipeline from beamforming through B-mode output.

title: open-UST: An Open-Source Ultrasound Tomography Transducer Array System
note: Technical source for an open-source rapidly prototyped ultrasound tomography transducer array.
